# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 600

A “through highway” is a highway or portion thereof at the entrance to which vehicular traffic from intersecting highways is regulated by stop signs or traffic control signals or is controlled when entering on a separated right-turn roadway by a yield-right-of-way sign.

*(Amended by Stats. 1969, Ch. 168.)*

subsections.text: A “through highway” is a highway or portion thereof at the entrance to which vehicular traffic from intersecting highways is regulated by stop signs or traffic control signals or is controlled when entering on a separated right-turn roadway by a yield-right-of-way sign.
